name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointGunHelper.ConstraintMinDistance
summary: For supportConstraint = 1: Support hand constraint distance will be slowly reduced until it hits this value.  This is for stability and also allows the pointing arm to lead a little.  Don't set lower than NM_MIN_STABLE_DISTANCECONSTRAINT_DISTANCE 0.001f.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 0.1f.
